// Generated by xlsynth::aot_builder from build spec "empty_tuple"
// (top="make_empty_tuple", function="make_empty_tuple").

unsafe extern "C" {
    #[link_name = "make_empty_tuple"]
    fn __xlsynth_aot_linked_symbol_empty_tuple();
}

const ENTRYPOINTS_PROTO: &[u8] = include_bytes!("empty_tuple.entrypoints.pb");
const INPUT_BUFFER_SIZES: &[usize] = &[];
const INPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS: &[usize] = &[];
const OUTPUT_BUFFER_SIZES: &[usize] = &[0];
const OUTPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS: &[usize] = &[8];

#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct Token {}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct Output {}

const OUTPUT0_LAYOUT: &[xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout] = &[];

#[allow(clippy::identity_op, clippy::let_and_return)]
fn decode_output_0(src: &[u8]) -> Output {
    debug_assert_eq!(src.len(), 0);
    let output: Output = Output {};
    debug_assert_eq!(OUTPUT0_LAYOUT.len(), 0);
    output
}

pub fn descriptor() -> xlsynth::AotEntrypointDescriptor<'static> {
    unsafe {
        xlsynth::AotEntrypointDescriptor::from_raw_parts_unchecked(
            ENTRYPOINTS_PROTO,
            __xlsynth_aot_linked_symbol_empty_tuple as *const () as usize,
            xlsynth::AotEntrypointMetadata {
                symbol: "make_empty_tuple".to_string(),
                input_buffer_sizes: INPUT_BUFFER_SIZES.to_vec(),
                input_buffer_alignments: INPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS.to_vec(),
                output_buffer_sizes: OUTPUT_BUFFER_SIZES.to_vec(),
                output_buffer_alignments: OUTPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS.to_vec(),
                temp_buffer_size: 0,
                temp_buffer_alignment: 1,
            },
        )
    }
}

pub struct Runner {
    inner: xlsynth::AotRunner<'static>,
}

impl Runner {
    pub fn new() -> Result<Self, xlsynth::XlsynthError> {
        Ok(Self {
            inner: xlsynth::AotRunner::new(descriptor())?,
        })
    }

    pub fn run_with_events(
        &mut self,
    ) -> Result<xlsynth::AotRunResult<Output>, xlsynth::XlsynthError> {
        self.inner.run_with_events(|inner| {
            let output = decode_output_0(inner.output(0));
            output
        })
    }

    pub fn run(&mut self) -> Result<Output, xlsynth::XlsynthError> {
        self.inner.run()?;
        let output = decode_output_0(self.inner.output(0));
        Ok(output)
    }
}

pub fn new_runner() -> Result<Runner, xlsynth::XlsynthError> {
    Runner::new()
}
